# Text

Renders body text with consistent size, weight, and tone.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/text
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="text"
  example={0}
  code={`<Text>The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.</Text>`}
/>

```tsx
<Text>The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.</Text>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="text"
  example={1}
  code={`<Text size="bodyLg" weight="medium">A lead paragraph with more presence.</Text>`}
/>

```tsx
<Text size="bodyLg" weight="medium">
  A lead paragraph with more presence.
</Text>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="text"
  example={2}
  code={`<Text tone="danger">Something needs your attention.</Text>`}
/>

```tsx
<Text tone="danger">Something needs your attention.</Text>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="text"
  example={3}
  code={`<Text>Press <Text.Strong>Save</Text.Strong> to keep changes, or <Text.Em>cancel</Text.Em>.</Text>`}
/>

```tsx
<Text>
  Press <Text.Strong>Save</Text.Strong> to keep changes, or <Text.Em>cancel</Text.Em>.
</Text>
```

## Props

| Prop        | Type          | Required | Default | Description                                                                       |
| ----------- | ------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `as`        | `TextElement` | No       | -       | Element to render. Defaults to \`p\`.                                             |
| `color`     | `TextColor`   | No       | -       | Neutral foreground colour. Ignored when \`tone\` is set. Defaults to \`default\`. |
| `lineClamp` | `number`      | No       | -       | Clamp to N lines with a trailing ellipsis (multi-line).                           |
| `size`      | `TextSize`    | No       | -       | -                                                                                 |
| `tone`      | `Tone`        | No       | -       | Selects a semantic status palette, overriding \`color\`.                          |
| `truncate`  | `boolean`     | No       | -       | Truncate to a single line with a trailing ellipsis.                               |
| `align`     | `TextAlign`   | No       | -       | -                                                                                 |
| `weight`    | `TextWeight`  | No       | -       | -                                                                                 |

## Variants

| Variant    | Values                                                                                                     |
| ---------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `size`     | `displayLg`, `display`, `h1`, `h2`, `h3`, `h4`, `h5`, `h6`, `bodyLg`, `body`, `bodySm`, `caption`, `micro` |
| `weight`   | `regular`, `medium`, `semibold`, `bold`                                                                    |
| `align`    | `start`, `center`, `end`, `justify`                                                                        |
| `truncate` | `true`                                                                                                     |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/text.json`
- Recipe: `text`
- Files: `src/components/ui/text.tsx`
